hero.subtitle: I build web applications with a focus on clarity, performance, and maintainability.

about.title: About me
about.heading: Hi, I'm Filipe
about.intro: I'm a developer focused on building clear, maintainable solutions. I care about user experience, performance, and clean architecture.
about.bio: I've been working across the stack — from front-end interfaces to backend services — and I enjoy turning ideas into reliable products. When I'm not coding, I like to keep learning and exploring new tools and practices.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My career path and main roles.

experiences.description: Leading features and improvements for web products. Working with React, TypeScript, and modern tooling. Collaborating with design and product to deliver accessible, performant UIs.
Built and maintained customer-facing and internal applications. Contributed to APIs, databases, and front-end interfaces.
Started my career building small features and fixing bugs. Learned best practices in version control, code review, and teamwork.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built or contributed to.

list.title: Project Alpha
list.description: A web app that helps users manage tasks and collaborate. Built with React and a REST API.

list.title: Project Beta
list.description: Dashboard for analytics and reporting. Real-time data and responsive layout.

list.title: Project Gamma
list.description: Open-source CLI tool for local development workflows. Used by several teams internally.
